title: AWS Secrets Manager Access Evaluation
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS Secrets Manager access depends on IAM permissions, resource policies, KMS decrypt authority, explicit deny, and organization guardrails.
objectives: Explain how Secrets Manager access is evaluated
Differentiate secret metadata access from secret value retrieval
Understand the relationship between secretsmanager:GetSecretValue and kms:Decrypt
Reason about Secrets Manager resource policies
Explain why IAM allow alone may not expose a secret
Understand how explicit deny, SCPs, and KMS key policies constrain access
Prepare learners for applied secret-access and Principal LAB reasoning
